personal.name: Jan-Eric Gaidusch
personal.title: Senior Backend Engineer
personal.subtitle: Software Engineer | AI Enthusiast
personal.tagline: Senior Software Engineer | 8+ Years Experience | AI & Backend Specialist
personal.bio: I'm a passionate Senior Software Engineer with over 8 years of hands-on experience in software development and IT operations across multiple industries. Currently, I'm working on conversational AI at Parloa GmbH in Berlin, where I design and implement AI solutions for customer service.

about.intro: Throughout my career, I've had the privilege of working with innovative companies in the AI and technology space:

expertise.title: AI & Machine Learning
expertise.description: Working with RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems, Large Language Models, and conversational AI platforms for enterprise customer service

expertise.title: Backend Architecture
expertise.description: Designing scalable microservices, message-driven systems, and real-time communication platforms using modern frameworks like NestJS and FastAPI

expertise.title: Cloud & DevOps
expertise.description: Orchestrating Kubernetes clusters, automating infrastructure with Terraform, and optimizing CI/CD pipelines for efficient software delivery

expertise.title: Team Collaboration
expertise.description: Contributing to team growth, supporting fellow engineers, participating in architectural discussions, and promoting continuous learning

interests.title: Horse Riding
interests.description: Exploring the German countryside on horseback

interests.title: Farm Life
interests.description: Working on the farm and connecting with nature

interests.title: Community
interests.description: Contributing to my local community at Freizeit Aktiv e.V.

about.connectMessage: I'm always interested in discussing new technologies, collaboration opportunities, or just connecting with fellow tech enthusiasts. Feel free to reach out through any of my social channels!

skills.intro: Throughout my 8+ years in software engineering, I've gained solid experience across a wide range of technologies, from AI/ML systems to cloud infrastructure. Here's my current technology stack:

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.description: Primary language for backend and frontend development. Building scalable enterprise applications with type safety.

skills.name: Python
skills.description: AI/ML development, data processing, and automation. Building intelligent systems and APIs.

skills.name: Java
skills.description: Enterprise applications and backend systems. Solid foundation in OOP and design patterns.

skills.name: NestJS
skills.description: Building scalable, enterprise-grade backend applications with TypeScript and dependency injection.

skills.name: FastAPI
skills.description: High-performance Python APIs for AI/ML services with automatic API documentation.

skills.name: React
skills.description: Modern frontend applications with hooks, context, and component-based architecture.

skills.name: RxJS
skills.description: Reactive programming and event-driven architectures for complex async workflows.

skills.name: RAG Systems
skills.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation architecture for AI applications with vector databases and semantic search.

skills.name: Large Language Models
skills.description: Building and integrating LLM-powered solutions with prompt engineering and fine-tuning.

skills.name: NLU Engines
skills.description: Natural Language Understanding systems for intent recognition and entity extraction.

skills.name: Speech Technologies
skills.description: STT, TTS, and voice processing pipelines for conversational AI applications.

skills.name: Kubernetes
skills.description: Container orchestration and cloud-native deployments with custom resources and operators.

skills.name: Helm Charts
skills.description: Kubernetes package management and deployment automation with templating and versioning.

skills.name: Terraform
skills.description: Infrastructure as Code for cloud automation and reproducible environments.

skills.name: Docker
skills.description: Containerization and microservices with multi-stage builds and optimization.

skills.name: Microsoft Azure
skills.description: Azure services, AKS, and cloud architecture with extensive production experience.

skills.name: Amazon Web Services
skills.description: AWS infrastructure and cloud services including EC2, S3, Lambda, and ECS.

experience.intro: Throughout my career, I've had the privilege of working with innovative companies across multiple industries, from conversational AI to industrial 3D printing. Here's my professional journey:

positions.title: Senior Backend Engineer
positions.summary: Parloa is a conversational AI company that provides a platform to manage AI agents for customer service - enabling enterprises to automate and improve customer interactions across voice, chat, email etc.
achievements: 🤖 Designed and implemented a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) product powering AI agents in customer service use cases
🏗️ Built the foundation of the Agent Management Platform, enabling scalable creation and management of AI agents
👥 Contributed to growing the engineering team by supporting interviews, onboarding and mentoring

⚡ Redesigned and rebuilt the Conversational Platform architecture (channels: SIP, WebSocket, REST; audio pipeline: STT, TTS, VAD) into a robust, message-driven system reducing latency and improving scalability

positions.title: Head of Engineering
positions.summary: Kauz develops linguistic-based Chatbots. With their NLU-Engine, Kauz improves the service quality and provides constant availability for customers and employees.
achievements: ☁️ Consolidated and migrated the operations landscape by introducing a cloud-agnostic Kubernetes-oriented approach
🏛️ Introduced a new architecture to enable better stability and scalability of the existing product

positions.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
positions.summary: Neohelden develops Neo, a self-learning AI assistant for businesses that can be used via voice and chat. Neo automates processes, increases operational efficiency, and levels up the user experience.
achievements: 🔄 Migrated and reimplemented a NodeJS backend application from FeathersJS to NestJS
🎤 Integrated Speech To Text and Text To Speech technologies as microservices
🐍 Developed and maintained a python SDK
🧠 Integrated support for multiple NLU Technologies into the core application
☸️ Introduced kubernetes compatibility with helm charts
🚀 Maintained and optimized development automations with Gitlab CI and Github Actions

positions.title: Software Engineer
positions.summary: Fiducia & GAD IT AG (now called Atruvia) is the main IT service provider for the Volksbanken in Germany. They focus on developing and providing banking software.
achievements: 🏦 Developed & Maintained a middle layer application to manage and execute BI reports on mainframe machines

education.intro: My educational journey has provided me with a strong foundation in computer science and software engineering, which I continue to build upon through continuous learning and hands-on experience.

degrees.degree: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) in Applied Informatics
degrees.description: The DHBW program combines theoretical knowledge with practical experience through a dual education system. I gained hands-on experience working with Fiducia & GAD IT AG while studying computer science fundamentals, software engineering principles, and enterprise application development.

highlights.label: Focus Areas
highlights.text: Software Engineering, Algorithms, Database Systems, Enterprise Architecture

degrees.description: Specialized in Information Technology, building a strong foundation in computer science concepts, programming fundamentals, and technical problem-solving.

continuousLearning.intro: Beyond formal education, I'm committed to continuous learning and staying current with emerging technologies. Here are some areas where I've developed expertise through professional experience and self-study:

professionalDevelopment.description: I believe in learning by doing. Throughout my career, I've gained practical expertise through:

items.text: 8+ years of hands-on software engineering experience
Leadership roles including Head of Engineering positions
Architecting and building production systems serving enterprise customers
Mentoring engineers and growing technical teams

volunteer.title: Managing Committee
volunteer.description: Freizeit Aktiv e.V. is a club offering its members multiple options to do sports and is also participating in the local carnival. Serving on the managing committee to support community engagement and sports activities.
